title: All Mobs are Creepers
description: Every mob that appears in the world will become a creeper. Now the world will be full of dangers!
body:
## Description
Every mob that appears in the world will become a creeper. Now the world will be full of dangers!

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LYEgMoU0/images/a8d4eb26135968dfc9fefeb0e68b4fcf59bcc3da.jpeg)

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
